text.title: Axum Handler Examples
text.summary: Worked CRUD handler set for a User resource demonstrating DTO design, AppState injection, validation, and error mapping.

example.note: DTOs are separate from domain models. `UserResponse` omits the password hash. `From<User> for UserResponse` handles the conversion.
State extractor comes first. `.validate()?` is the first statement in create. All handlers return `Result<_, AppError>`.

section.title: Integration test

example.note: Uses `oneshot` on the real Router; no HTTP server required. Tests both happy path and validation failure.

section.reference: oneshot integration test skeleton with test_state helper
